_comment: Role-stratified bias corrections v6. Recalibrated 2026-07-09 to conservative empirical values. Previous hand-crafted values (starter|pts=1.74) caused ~74% over-prediction vs market lines. New values derived from OOF ratio analysis — net_mult = role_corr / global_corr applied in apply_role_stratified_corrections. Starter premium capped at 25% over global correction.
